# Irregular quad with stalls_per_face=3 — stresses cross-aisle insertion
# on a non-axis-aligned boundary.

polygon outer
(566.27,188.01)
(750,0)
(718.58,459.19)
(513.49,459.19)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (513.490,0)-(750,459.190), area 67038.005

set stalls-per-face=3
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 90
faces: 22 (boundary: 1, interior: 21)
graph: 47 vertices, 77 edges (perimeter: 30, interior: 47)
regions: 1
